Params: {3: 'The spectral mist howls as it suddenly fills the space around you, swallowing your vision whole.'}
{3: 'The cold wind drones in your ears while an overwhelming flood of information crashes against your thoughts like towering waves, repeatedly battering your disoriented mind.'}
{3: 'Crimson threads twist and surge, ensnaring all colors like a spider\'s web. From the bottomless darkness comes an incessant droning, echoing with strange, unsettling whispers.'}
{3: 'Inexplicably, an itching sensation suddenly arises, brushing against your heart and spreading to your lungs, forcing you to let out a few dry coughs.'}
{3: 'A blood-stained hand grabs you through the swirling smoke.'}
{2: 'Festering Refugee', 3: 'My child is still inside... Officer, please! Save her!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The woman begs frantically, her voice barely audible through the mist yet somehow intensifying the itching in your chest.'}
{3: 'Coughing, you try to clear the mist from your vision, but the mutilated hand remains firmly clenched around your arm.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Festering Firefighter', 3: 'The core temperature is too high... There are Corrupted blocking the water pumps. Someone needs to help us get through.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Another hand seizes you, its grip rough and forceful, triggering a violent fit of coughing.'}

{3: 'A crimson haze envelopes everything around you. As if trudging through a festering esophagus, you are met with countless invisible hands tearing at your body for each step you take. Progress is agonizingly difficult.'}
{3: 'In the darkness, agonized wails rise and fall, urging you to press onward.'}
{3: 'As if shackled by invisible chains, you stagger through the mire. Suddenly, a searing pain shoots through your throat. You stumble forward as something hot and wet erupts from your lungs.'}
{3: 'Your body is rotting away under the corrosion of the Punishing Virus.'}
{3: 'Suddenly, a beam of light breaks through, illuminating a small figure standing in the center of this bloody world.'}

{3: 'The muck beneath your feet feels like fleshy tendrils that are clinging to bones. Each step you take feels like a dull blade scraping against raw flesh, sending excruciating pain through every inch of your body.'}
{3: 'The girl gives no response, staying still with her back turned.'}
{3: 'Her head is severed, hanging only by a thin layer of skin at the neck that barely supports the weight of her skull.'}
{3: 'The grotesque head twists around in midair, her lips stretching into a horrifying, unnatural smile.'}
{3: 'In that moment, countless hands lunge forward. They are not refugees or firefighters, but Corrupted molded by the Red Mist, hiding in the shadows like vicious beasts.'}
{3: 'The girl clutches her stomach, her eyes wide with shock and disbelief as she stares at you.'}
{3: 'Barely breathing, she asks you with a broken voice as the crimson stain beneath her hand spreads steadily, soaking her entire white garment.'}
{3: 'The thick, disorienting mist has blurred the line between reality and illusion, driving you to commit an unforgivable sin.'}
{3: 'With no time to question what is real, your body moves on its own, reaching out to catch the collapsing girl before she hits the ground.'}
{3: 'In that moment, regret and agony seize your heart as one. Blood spills from your mouth, spattering across the girl\'s pale cheeks.'}
{3: 'As exhaustion overtakes you, savage metal claws tear through your skin, aiming straight for your face—'}
{3: 'A massive scythe intercepts the attack, severing the Corrupted\'s arm.'}
{2: 'Nirvatia', 3: 'All of you... STAY AWAY FROM COMMANDANT!!!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She cries with fury, her massive blade swinging like a tempest and crackling with violet lightning. It cleaves through the swarming enemies, leaving shattered gashes in the walls behind.'}

{3: 'From the darkness in the distance, howls resound once more. Enemies swarm in from the ceiling, walls, and floor, converging into a crimson tide that surges forward, devouring what little space remains.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Festering Refugee', 3: 'Why?! Why did you kill her?!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The thick fog before you hasn\'t dissipated, and bloodied arms continue to tear at your body.'}
{3: 'Against the devastation of the Red Mist, any resistance is futile. Despite your will, your body succumbs.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Festering Refugee', 3: 'Give me back my child... Give her back!!!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Suddenly, a warm hand pats your cheek.'}
{3: 'Your blurred vision comes back into focus, centering once more on the dire reality before you.'}
{2: 'Nirvatia', 3: 'The first injection might hurt a bit. Bear with it.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'In the next instant, your airways clear completely. Fresh air rushes into your lungs in great gulps, and your fading consciousness begins to piece itself back together.'}
{3: 'Meanwhile, the tremors in the distance grow closer. Within the sea of steel, you catch a fleeting glimpse of silver-white—'}
{3: 'She weakly raises her arm. Countless metal beasts roar as one, merging together and charging toward Nirvatia and you.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Nirvatia', 3: 'Looks like... this is as far as I can go with you.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She tears off a strip of bandage, removes the Red Mist Blocker from her waist, and attaches it to you.'}
{3: 'The medicine surges through your bloodstream, a tingling numbness spreading throughout your body. You remain frozen, unable to move.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Nirvatia', 3: 'Even you have to admit that humans are no match for her, right?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Nirvatia', 3: 'I\'ll hold her off here while you press on. Find a way to destroy the Golden Oak and end this nightmare.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She steps forward, gently pressing her palm against you.'}
{2: 'Nirvatia', 3: 'It\'s a shame we won\'t get to go for that drive together... but in this brief time, I\'ve seen enough wonders to last a lifetime.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Then, with a sudden force, she pushes you backward—'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Nirvatia', 3: 'I\'ll catch up to you if there\'s a chance.', 4: '18'}
{3: 'She looks at you, tilting her head slightly with that same gentle smile from when you first met.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Nirvatia', 3: 'And if I\'m not careful enough and miss that chance...', 4: '18'}
{2: 'Nirvatia', 3: 'Then please, get these records out of here. Tell the people, tell the world...', 4: '18'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Nirvatia', 3: 'That we, the Carthakians, have really lived.', 4: '18'}
{3: 'Then, she presses the emergency descent button.'}
{1: 'The elevator doors close, the cables roaring as you plummet downward, leaving all the chaos far behind.', 2: 'ffffffff', 4: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 6: '1', 7: '1'}

{1: 'Your worlds now stand apart. The M.I.N.D. connection is the only bridge between you, carrying both hope and worry across the expanse of your divided hearts.', 2: 'ffffffff', 4: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 6: '1', 7: '1'}

{1: 'You both know the other is fighting desperately to complete what only each other can do. You are both giving everything to end this catastrophe that has spanned decades.', 2: 'ffffffff', 4: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 6: '1', 7: '1'}
{1: 'In this moment, despite all your reluctance and regret, you both must forge ahead.', 2: 'ffffffff', 4: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 6: '1', 9: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Margaret', 3: 'Stay back... I won\'t let you steal everyone\'s hope...', 4: '2'}
{3: 'Nirvatia suddenly remembers how someone once stood protectively in front of her just like this.'}
{3: 'And now, she has carried that flame to somewhere further and brighter.'}
{2: 'Nirvatia', 3: 'I\'ll stay in the past, little raven...', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She steps forward, swinging her scythe with absolute resolve, and she charges into the dark, endless abyss.', 4: '1'}
